cause_analysis.narrative: Marcia's Glam Salon LLC churned on 2026-04-08 after 164 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 108 times, but the client only replied 9. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-22 via sms, client wrote: "Yes…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-22 via sms, client wrote: "Good morning…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Hi Marcia, Ray from ZOCA here—quick one: out of 100 people who click your booking link, how many actually book? Most owners aren’t sure (and lose clients because of it). Want to see what’s slipping through? Reply YES.
